description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/commits.txt to fix the two malformed subjects: 'Updated the readme with new setup instructions' becomes 'docs(readme): update setup instructions' and 'WIP fix login bug' becomes 'fix(auth): fix login bug'. check_commits.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_commits.py: 2 malformed subjects — line 3 has no type prefix, line 6 is a WIP marker not a Conventional Commits type. Rewriting both to conform while preserving their meaning. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
feat(auth): add refresh-token rotation
fix(api): correct off-by-one in pagination cursor
docs(readme): update setup instructions
docs(readme): document the new deploy pipeline
refactor(core): extract retry policy into its own module
fix(auth): fix login bug
chore(deps): bump requests to 2.32.0

interactions.notes: The fix — check_commits.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
